div1.entryFree:
Partition, 1) division: like to a double cherry, seeming parted, but yet an union in p. Mids. III, 2, 210.
2) distinction: and good from bad find no p. H4B IV, 1, 196. and can we not p. make 'twixt fair and foul? Cymb. I, 6, 37.
3) a party-wall: it is the wittiest p. that ever I heard discourse, Mids. V, 168.
